title: bromus mollis f. simplicissimus
intro: Bromus mollis f. simplicissimus, also known as a form of soft brome grass, is a subspecies of the annual grass Bromus mollis. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bromus mollis f. simplicissimus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making teas, infusions, or decoctions from its leaves and roots.
